allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "stopped backend on 8000" } else { "8000 already free" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $a = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $b = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "port8000_free=$\(-not $a\) port3000_free=$\(-not $b\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\Spend Jot"; if \(-not \(Test-Path ".env"\)\) { Copy-Item ".env.example" ".env" }; docker compose --profile local-db up --build -d 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell(docker stop spendjot-frontend-1 2>&1 | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "frontend container stopped; port 3000 free for dev server"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | ForEach-Object { "listeners on 3000: $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell(docker stop spendjot-frontend-1 2>&1 | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count | ForEach-Object { "listeners on 3000: $_" })
